name: Shelkopolis Civic Harmony Hall Variant
summary: Shelkopolis-specific harmony hall tuned to Shelk legal culture, bounty processing, and mixed civic-aesthetic expectations.
day_to_day: Processes fines, bounties, mediation, and custody with Shelk-specific decorum and fashion-law interplay.
who_works_there: Shelk clerks, arbiters, guards, bounty processors, shrine attendants.
who_uses_it: Residents, Roadwardens, merchants, bounty hunters, accused citizens.
authority: Local administrative and holding authority within the broader harmony hall system.
public_manifestation: Elegant but busy intake halls, posted fines, fashion and decorum disputes, guarded cells.
conflict_or_bottleneck: The hall must balance elegance and fairness while handling real coercive power.
party_actions: pay or dispute a bounty matter
